author: tbenr
content: so we have definitiely room for optimization for gloas transition independently by the ssz (like drill down in builder onboarding\ptc window) than we also should do a drill down on a fater way of rebuilding sszs (try to shave that additional second)

author: tbenr
content: oh.. seems like we drop all the caches when we do the state upgrade.. that's why is so slow.. interesting.
